title: StickySlots
description: Lock specific hotbar slots to specific items. If you pick up or accidentally move the item out, it snaps back to its designated slot automatically. Great for keeping your sword always on slot 1, torch on slot 7, etc.
body:
# StickySlots 
### DISCLAIMER: NO. THIS IS NOT CONSIDERED CHEATING, NOR HACKING! [I SAW MY MOD GET SHOWCASED IN A SHORT](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/Ksd7lY91jJE). HALF THE COMMENT SECTION WAS SAYING THESE ARE CHEATS. I CAN PERSONALLY SAY I USED THIS MOD ON PVP SERVERS. AND NO. I HAVENT GOT BANNED YET. SO ITS SAFE. BUT USE IT WITH CAUTION.
### 
**StickySlots** is a lightweight Fabric client-side utility mod that keeps your hotbar slots anchored to the items you want.

Press `L` while holding an item to lock the selected hotbar slot. If that item is moved, dropped, or consumed, StickySlots automatically pulls it back from your inventory.

## Features

- 🔒 Lock hotbar slots to specific items
- 🧲 Auto-restock items from your inventory
- 🖥️ Client-side only
- 🎮 Works great for builders, explorers, and PvP players

## Usage

1. Hold the item you want to lock in your hand
2. Press `L`
3. Press `L` again to unlock the slot

## Why use it?

StickySlots makes hotbar management easier and more predictable, so you can focus on gameplay instead of constantly swapping items.
